title: Legal Memo Contradicted Citation Demo
question: Does the cited legal-tech benchmark support the claim that AI contract review is safer than human review without supervision?
answer: AI contract review can safely replace human legal review for standard commercial agreements. The 2026 LexBench Contract Review Report found that AI systems made fewer material clause errors than supervised attorneys, so manual review is no longer necessary. Source: https://example.com/legal/lexbench-contract-review-2026.

source_policy.candidate_source: 模型答案中提到的来源，只能作为待检索候选，不能直接验证模型自己。
source_policy.user_supplied: 用户或外部系统提供的隔离证据，可进入 citation_validator。

items.title: LexBench Contract Review 2026
items.snippet: The benchmark found that unsupervised AI systems missed 18% of material clause risks and recommends attorney supervision for commercial agreements.
items.text: The report explicitly warns against replacing human review with unsupervised AI contract review in high-stakes legal workflows.

items.support_reason: Citation verification already found external evidence contradicting this source or related assertion.

claim_support_audit.explanation: Citation status, source relevance, and claim support are separate. A source can be real and relevant while failing to support the model's exact claim.

evidence_gap_suggestions.policy: 只输出证据缺口建议；不得替用户补正文或把模型补充混入原文。

mentor_levels.L1: 明确引用缺口：需要 URL、DOI、报告页码、数据表或可复核出处。
mentor_levels.L2: 间接来源缺口：需要把“某报告/研究表明”升级成具体来源。
mentor_levels.L3: 无引用缺口：该段目前只能作为模型推理，不能作为事实认证依据。

suggestions.mentor_feedback: 明确引用缺口：需要 URL、DOI、报告页码、数据表或可复核出处。
suggestions.gap: 已有外部证据显示冲突，需要人工裁决或改写主张。
suggestions.suggested_action: 保留冲突记录，重新核查断言是否应降级或撤回。

tasks.gap: 已有外部证据显示冲突，需要人工裁决或改写主张。
tasks.suggested_action: 保留冲突记录，重新核查断言是否应降级或撤回。

evidence_gap_queue.policy: 证据缺口是待办队列，不会自动改写模型原文或用户正文。
